title: Withdrawal of CIRP, expansion of CoC role and more: Highlights of IBC Amendment Act 2026
description: The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Act, 2026 has received Presidential assent and been published in the Official Gazette. It introduces significant changes to India’s insolvency framework, including stricter limits on withdrawal of proceedings.A central feature of the amendment is the revision of Section 12A (withdrawal of insolvency proceedings), which now restricts withdrawal of corporate insolvency resolution process (CIRP) proceedings at key stages.
